select.isEmpty: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = N'1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = N'2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , N'0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE BRD_ID = 1 AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEmpty.isEqual: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = N'1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = N'2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , N'0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE Brd_Upper = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step
isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = N'1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = N'2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , N'0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE Brd_Upper = NVL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = N'1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.BRD_ID BRD_ID , A.BRD_NM BRD_NM , A.BRD_NM2 BRD_NM2 , A.BRD_LEVEL BRD_LEVEL , A.BRD_STEP BRD_STEP , A.BRD_POSTTERM BRD_POSTTERM , A.BRD_UPPER BRD_UPPER , A.BRD_GB BRD_GB , A.BRD_URL BRD_URL , A.BRD_EXPLAIN BRD_EXPLAIN , A.BRD_ACCESS BRD_ACCESS , A.ATTACH_SIZE ATTACH_SIZE , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT , ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_RESCNT , '0' ACCESS_LVL , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_ID = 1 AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND ( MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT DISTINCT(BRD_ID), A.BRD_NM AS BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2 AS BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL AS BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP AS BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM AS BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER AS BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB AS BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL AS BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN AS BRD_EXPLAIN, A.BRD_ACCESS AS BRD_ACCESS, A.ATTACH_SIZE AS ATTACH_SIZE, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID), 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SUB_CLSCNT, ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(BRD_ID), 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL, A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_P_PARENTID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.BRD_GB = '1' AND ( MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION SELECT DISTINCT(BRD_ID), A.BRD_NM AS BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2 AS BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL AS BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP AS BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM AS BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER AS BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB AS BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL AS BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN AS BRD_EXPLAIN, A.BRD_ACCESS AS BRD_ACCESS, A.ATTACH_SIZE AS ATTACH_SIZE, 0 AS SUB_CLSCNT, 0 AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL, A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_P_PARENTID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.BRD_GB = '2' AND ( MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_GB, BRD_STEP

sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_ID , CASE #v_LANG# WHEN '1' THEN BRD_NM ELSE BRD_NM2 END BRD_NM, APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_BRD_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_COMPANY# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_GB, BRD_STEP

SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , TO_CHAR(WRITEDAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= to_date(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '0' AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERNAME# || '%' OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERNAME# || '%' ) AND ( B.DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERDEPT# || '%' OR B.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERDEPT# || '%' ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A WHERE STARTDATE <= to_date(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND to_date(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '0' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.OWNERID , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , TO_CHAR(WRITEDAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.APPROVEFLAG , SCH.OWNERNM , DEPTNM , SCH.COMPANYID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND REFLAG = '0' AND BRD.BRD_UPPER = #v_pOwnerID# AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.num , PNUM , A.ownerID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , TO_CHAR(WRITEDAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , A.companyID , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , B.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , B.DISPLAYNAME2 OWNERNM2 , B.DESCRIPTION DEPTNM , B.DESCRIPTION2 DEPTNM2 , B.TITLE JOBTITLE , B.TITLE2 JOBTITLE2 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.writerID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULERepetition C ON A.ownerID = C.ownerID AND A.num = C.num AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= to_date(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '1' AND ( to_date(#v_PENDDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= ENDDATETIME OR to_date(#v_PENDDATE#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= ENDDATETIME ) AND ( B.DISPLAYNAME LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERNAME# || '%' OR B.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERNAME# || '%' ) AND ( B.DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERDEPT# || '%' OR B.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE '%' || #v_WRITERDEPT# || '%' ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.ownerID , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE , TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , TO_CHAR(WRITEDAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.ApproveFlag , SCH.ownerNM , DEPTNM , SCH.companyID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD.Brd_Upper = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '1' AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT OWNERID, NUM, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATETIME, TO_CHAR(ENDDATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATETIME, REWAY, RENUM, REDAY, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_COMPANY, BRD_COUNT, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_GB, BRD_GROUP, BRD_ID, BRD_LEVEL, $v_PBRDNM$ AS BRD_NM, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_REF, BRD_STEP, BRD_UPPER, BRD_URL, MAKEDATE, OWNDEPTID, $v_POWNDEPTNM$ AS OWNDEPTNM, OWNERCALL, OWNERID, $v_POWNERNM$ AS OWNERNM, $v_POWNERPOSITION$ AS OWNERPOSITION, REPLY_MAIL_FG, RESLOCATION FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND ROWNUM <= #v_PTOPCNT# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(BRD_ID) cnt FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT BRD_ID , BRD_NM , BRD_NM2 , BRD_EXPLAIN , OWNDEPTID , OWNDEPTNM , OWNDEPTNM2 , OWNERID , OWNERNM , OWNERNM2 , OWNERPOSITION , OWNERPOSITION2 , OWNERCALL , NVL(RESLOCATION, ' ') RESLOCATION , SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 7, 2) MAKEDATE , NVL(APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG , BRD_ACCESS FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pBrdID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_pCompanyID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_STEP = BRD_STEP - 1 WHERE BRD_UPPER = ( SELECT Brd_Upper FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND BRD_STEP > ( SELECT BRD_STEP FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET OWNDEPTID = RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptID#), OWNDEPTNM = RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptNm#), OWNERID = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerID#), OWNERNM = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerNm#), OWNERPOSITION = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerPos#), OWNERCALL = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerCall#), BRD_NM = RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM#), RESLOCATION = RTRIM(#v_P_ResLocation#), BRD_EXPLAIN = RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_Explain#), APPROVEFLAG = RTRIM(#v_P_Approve#), BRD_NM2 = RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM2#), OWNDEPTNM2 = RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptNm2#), OWNERNM2 = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerNm2#), OWNERPOSITION2 = RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerPos2#) WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT (NVL(MAX(BRD_ID) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (BRD_LEVEL + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (NVL(MAX(Brd_Step) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_BRD ( BRD_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERCALL, BRD_NM, RESLOCATION, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_COMPANY , BRD_ID, BRD_GB, BRD_LEVEL, BRD_STEP, MAKEDATE, ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_GROUP, BRD_URL, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_COUNT, BRD_REF, APPROVEFLAG , BRD_NM2, OWNDEPTNM2, OWNERNM2, OWNERPOSITION2, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_P_ClassGB#, RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptID#), RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptNm#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerID#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerNm#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerPos#) ,RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerCall#), RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM#), RTRIM(#v_P_ResLocation#), RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_Explain#), RTRIM(#v_P_CompanyID#), #v_Brd_ID# ,RTRIM(#v_Brd_GB#), RTRIM(#v_Brd_Level#), RTRIM(#v_Brd_Step#), TO_CHAR(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP),'YYYYMMDD') ,20, u'A00', u'', #v_Brd_Access#, 365, 0, 0, RTRIM(#v_P_Approve#) ,RTRIM(#v_P_Brd_NM2#), RTRIM(#v_P_ODeptNm2#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerNm2#), RTRIM(#v_P_OwnerPos2#), #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET APPROVEFLAG = #v_PAPPROVE# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION SET STARTDATETIME = TO_DATE(#v_pStartDateTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATETIME = TO_DATE(#v_pEndDateTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), REWAY = #v_pReWay#, REDAY = #v_pReDay#, RENUM = #v_pReNum#, REYOIL = #v_pReYoil#, REMONTH = #v_pReMonth#, REORD = #v_pReOrd#, ENDFLAG = #v_pEndFlag#, RECOUNT = #v_pReCount# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE, REFLAG, GRESFLAG, TO_CHAR(WRITEDAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, PUBLICFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION ( NUM, OWNERID, STARTDATETIME, ENDDATETIME, REWAY, REDAY, RENUM, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pNum#, #v_pOwnerID#, TO_DATE(#v_pStartDateTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_pEndDateTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , #v_pReWay#, #v_pReDay#, #v_pReNum#, #v_pReYoil#, #v_pReMonth# , #v_pReOrd#, #v_pEndFlag#, #v_pReCount#, #v_pCompanyID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE, REFLAG, GRESFLAG, TO_CHAR(WRITEDAY, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, PUBLICFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND PNUM = #v_pNum# AND OWNERID = #v_pEntryID# AND WRITERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RESID, BRDNM, FORMTEXT FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_pRESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND OWNERID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BRD_UPPER FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND RESID = #v_BRD_UPPER# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT NVL(APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_RESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM SET BRDNM = #v_BRDNM#, FORMTEXT = #v_FORMTEXT# WHERE RESID = #v_RESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_DELCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET REFLAG = '4' WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, pnum, ownerID, writerID, deptNM, ownerNM, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, companyID, characterID, attachFlag, tenant_ID ) SELECT #v_MaxNum# num, #v_P_pnum# pnum, OWNERID , WRITERID , DEPTNM , OWNERNM , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , TO_DATE(#v_P_sDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') startDate , TO_DATE(#v_P_eDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') endDate , ALERTTIME , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , '4' reFlag, GRESFLAG , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') writeDay , #v_P_companyID# companyID , CHARACTERID , ATTACHFLAG , tenant_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_pnum# AND REFLAG = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPTNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE ( COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) OR ( COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, ownerID, writerID, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, attachFlag, companyID, characterID , ownerNM, deptNM, ApproveFlag, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_P_num#, #v_P_ownerID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_title#, #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, #v_P_reFlag#, #v_P_gresFlag#, #v_P_entryList#, #v_P_allDay#, #nowDate#, #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_characterID#, #v_tmpOwnerNm#, #v_tmpDeptNm#, #v_P_Approve#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #v_P_title#, LOCATION = #v_P_location#, TIMEDISPLAY = #v_P_timeDisplay#, STARTDATE = TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ALERTTIME = #v_P_alertTime#, CONTENT = #v_P_content#, IMPORTANCE = #v_P_importance#, REFLAG = #v_P_reFlag#, GRESFLAG = #v_P_gresFlag#, ALLDAY = #v_P_allDay#, WRITEDAY = #nowDate#, ENTRYLIST = #v_P_entryList#, ATTACHFLAG = #v_P_attachFlag#, CHARACTERID = #v_P_characterID# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT (NVL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_writerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, pnum, ownerID, writerID, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, attachFlag, companyID, characterID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxNum#, #v_P_pnum#, #v_P_ownerID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_title#, #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, #v_P_startDate#, #v_P_endDate#, #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, 3, #v_P_gresFlag#, #v_P_entryList#, #v_P_allDay#, #nowDate#, #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_characterID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = RTRIM(#v_P_title#), LOCATION = RTRIM(#v_P_location#), TIMEDISPLAY = RTRIM(#v_P_timeDisplay#), STARTDATE = TO_DATE(RTRIM(#v_P_startDate#),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENDDATE = TO_DATE(RTRIM(#v_P_endDate#), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ALERTTIME = RTRIM(#v_P_alertTime#), CONTENT = #v_P_content#, IMPORTANCE = RTRIM(#v_P_importance#), REFLAG = RTRIM(#v_P_reFlag#), GRESFLAG = RTRIM(#v_P_gresFlag#), ALLDAY = RTRIM(#v_P_allDay#), WRITEDAY = to_date(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), ENTRYLIST = RTRIM(#v_P_entryList#), ATTACHFLAG = RTRIM(#v_P_attachFlag#), CHARACTERID = RTRIM(#v_P_characterID#), APPROVEFLAG = RTRIM(#v_P_Approve#) WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT (NVL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE , REFLAG, GRESFLAG, WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( RTRIM(#v_P_ownerID#), RTRIM(#v_Num#), RTRIM(#v_P_pnum#), RTRIM(#v_P_companyID#), RTRIM(#v_P_writerID#), RTRIM(#v_P_deptNM#), RTRIM(#v_P_ownerNM#), RTRIM(#v_P_title#) , RTRIM(#v_P_location#), RTRIM(#v_P_timeDisplay#), TO_DATE(RTRIM(#v_P_startDate#),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(RTRIM(#v_P_endDate#),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , RTRIM(#v_P_allDay#), RTRIM(#v_P_alertTime#), #v_P_content#, RTRIM(#v_P_importance#), NVL(#v_P_reFlag#,' '), NVL(#v_P_gresFlag#,' '), TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:MI:ss') , RTRIM(#v_P_entryList#), NVL(#v_P_characterID#,0), RTRIM(#v_P_attachFlag#), RTRIM(#v_P_Approve#), RTRIM(#v_P_ScheduleID#), #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(num), 0) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT OWNERID, NUM, COMPANYID, TO_CHAR(STARTDATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATETIME, TO_CHAR(ENDDATETIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATETIME, REWAY, RENUM, REDAY, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C.ownerID as ownerID , C.num as num , C.companyID , TO_CHAR(C.startDateTime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') startDateTime , TO_CHAR(C.endDateTime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') endDateTime , C.reWay as reWay, C.reNum as reNum, C.reDay as reDay, C.reYoil , C.reMonth as reMonth, C.reOrd as reOrd, C.endFlag as endFlag, C.reCount as reCount, B.allDay as allDay FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE B JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION C ON B.ownerID = C.ownerID AND B.num = C.num AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.companyID = #v_p_companyID# AND B.ownerID = #v_p_ownerID# AND B.ApproveFlag = '1' AND B.num <> ( CASE #v_p_cmd# WHEN 'add' THEN -1 ELSE #v_p_num# END ) AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT member_id, access_lvl FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE companyid = #companyID# AND resid = #resID# AND member_id = #memberID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT BRD_NM BRDNM , OWNERID , OWNERNM , HR.MAIL MAILADDRESS FROM TBL_RS_BRD RES JOIN TBL_USERMASTER HR ON RES.OwnerID = HR.CN AND RES.TENANT_ID = HR.TENANT_ID WHERE BRD_ID = #v_BRD_ID# AND RES.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT S.WRITERID, S.OWNERNM, S.DEPTNM, S.TITLE, TO_CHAR(S.STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(S.ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ENDDATE, T.BRD_NM, HR.MAIL FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE S INNER JOIN TBL_RS_BRD T ON S.OWNERID = T.BRD_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER HR ON S.WRITERID = HR.CN AND S.TENANT_ID = HR.TENANT_ID WHERE S.OWNERID = #resID# AND S.NUM = #num# AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') STARTDATE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE PNUM = #v_P_pNum# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
